text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of computers and machines to perform tasks that usually require human intelligence. One important part of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from data instead of being explicitly programmed for every situation. A more advanced area is deep learning, which uses complex neural networks to process information like the human brain. You interact with AI every day without realizing it. For example, when you ask a voice assistant a question, receive product recommendations online, or use a navigation app to find the fastest route, AI is working behind the scenes. These technologies make our lives more convenient and efficient.
